description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine:edge Docker image. Define two jobs, mypy and ruff, both running in the default test stage. In each job add a before_script that executes `adduser -D build`, then run the script `.ci/mypy.sh` for the mypy job and `.ci/ruff.sh` for the ruff job. No services, caches, artifacts, or special rules are required.
